Stars on the Court: Celebrities Playing Pickleball

By Billy Walters • 5/10/2024
pickleball-101

Celebrities playing pickleball are making the sport more famous. This includes top athletes and big Hollywood names. It’s getting a lot of attention from these stars and their fans.

You’re about to explore the world of pickleball with celebrities. This sport is a big hit with A-listers. They show their love for pickleball in exciting matches and tournaments. This really boosts pickleball’s popularity.

Key Takeaways:

  • Celebrities playing pickleball have significantly contributed to the sport’s popularity and recognition.
  • Pickleball has attracted famous athletes, Hollywood stars, and other popular personalities.
  • From Selena Gomez to Michael Phelps, celebrities actively participate in pickleball matches and tournaments.
  • The involvement of celebrities in pickleball has sparked interest and inspired others to join this fun-filled sport.
  • Pickleball offers excitement, camaraderie, and a chance to stay active, making it the perfect choice for celebrities and individuals alike.

Selena Gomez: Pickleball’s Pop Princess

Selena Gomez is known for singing, acting, and giving back. For years, she’s been a fan of pickleball, even investing in a pickleball business. This shows her commitment to growing the sport.

Being a big name in entertainment, Gomez supports pickleball openly. Her posts and outings show her enjoying matches with friends. This has sparked interest in pickleball across various people.

Gomez’s passion for pickleball isn’t just personal. It spreads the word about the sport’s fun and physical benefits. She shines a light on pickleball’s inclusivity and appeal to diverse groups.

“Pickleball is a fantastic sport that combines physical activity, social interaction, and a lot of fun. I find it to be a great way to stay active and connect with others. Investing in a pickleball business was a natural step for me, as I wanted to contribute to the growth of this amazing sport and provide more opportunities for people to experience the joy of playing.”

Selena Gomez’s fame has helped pickleball gain fans. By playing and supporting it, she encourages many to try the sport.

Selena Gomez’s Pickleball Business Ventures

Aside from her playing, Gomez has set her foot in pickleball’s business world. She sees the sport’s potential and invests to help it grow.

Though we don’t know the exact businesses Gomez is in, her interest shows how pickleball is catching the eye of business people.

Celebrities and Their Business Ventures

Celebrity Business Venture
Selena Gomez Pickleball Business
… …

Ellen DeGeneres: Dancing and Dinking

Ellen DeGeneres loves pickleball more than just being a TV star and comedian. She plays with lots of passion and fun. Her lively spirit catches the heart of fans and viewers alike.

On social media, Ellen shows off her pickleball adventures. She posts pictures and videos of herself on the court. You can see how much she enjoys the game.

She even brings pickleball into her talk show, “The Ellen DeGeneres Show.” She hosts segments where she and her guests play, creating fun moments. This not only entertains but also introduces the sport to new people.

“Pickleball is not just a game; it’s a source of laughter and fun. Playing pickleball with my friends and celebrity guests brings out the best in everyone. It’s a great way to unwind, connect, and enjoy some friendly competition. Trust me, once you start playing pickleball, you won’t be able to stop!” – Ellen DeGeneres

Ellen’s spark in pickleball has touched her fans deeply. It shows how the sport brings people together in joy. Her humor and charm make pickleball attractive for all kinds of folks, blending sports with laughter.

Ellen DeGeneres in Pickleball Highlights
Active on Social Media Ellen shares her pickleball journey through entertaining videos and photos, inspiring her followers to join the fun.
Pickleball on “The Ellen DeGeneres Show” Ellen invites celebrity guests to play pickleball, creating comedic moments that entertain and raise awareness of the sport.
Championing Joy and Laughter Ellen’s involvement in pickleball reflects her commitment to spreading joy and laughter, making the sport even more appealing to her fans.

Michael Phelps: The Pickleball Paddler

When you think of Michael Phelps, swimming’s giant likely comes to mind. He’s won an amazing 23 golds at the Olympics. But did you know he’s also a fan of pickleball?

Phelps joining in on pickleball shows how the game can attract top athletes from various sports. Both swimming and pickleball need you to be quick, precise, and agile. For Phelps, it’s a fun and tough way to keep in shape.

Phelps moving from the pool to the pickleball court is quite a shift. His success in swimming has followed him, and now he’s a force in pickleball. He brings skill and a winning mindset to this new game.

His love for pickleball not only sheds light on the sport but also inspires athletes to try different things. Phelps’ keenness for pickleball motivates others. He shows everyone that sports can bring joy in many forms.

Phelps keeps making headlines in the pickleball world. We’re eagerly waiting to see more of his thrilling games and incredible skills in this new chapter of his sporting life.

Michael Phelps’s Pickleball Achievements:

Tournament Year Result
Professional Pickleball Association (PPA) Championships 2020 Quarterfinals
US Open Pickleball Championships 2019 Round of 16
Pickleball Central Classic 2018 Runner-up
World Pickleball Championship 2017 Semifinals

Phelps is known for his determination in swimming. Now, he’s looking to achieve more in pickleball. Watching someone like Phelps take on a new sport is quite thrilling.

Matthew Perry: From “Friends” to Fellow Players

Matthew Perry is well-known for playing Chandler Bing on “Friends.” He’s not just a skilled actor, though. He’s also a big fan of pickleball. His love for the game has helped make pickleball more popular through playing and joining competitions.

Pickleball mixes tennis, badminton, and ping pong. It has won over many people across the globe. Perry’s support for pickleball has encouraged others to try it. Many find pickleball brings people together and builds friendships.

In his own words, Perry says, “Pickleball is a fantastic way to stay fit, have fun, and connect with others.” This highlights the community’s feelings about the sport. Whether you’re new or experienced, you’ll find a welcoming place and chances for friendly games.

“I love the intense yet friendly atmosphere of pickleball tournaments. It’s a chance to showcase my skills and bond with fellow players who share the same passion for the game.”

Perry’s starring in celebrity pickleball matches has done a lot for the sport. His role in promoting the activity has helped it grow. By playing in big tournaments, he’s shown more people the sport.

Matthew Perry’s Pickleball Achievements

Tournament Achievement
2020 Celebrity Pickleball Championship Runner-up
Pickleball Pro-Am Invitational Winner
Charity Pickleball Tournament Most Valuable Player

Perry’s work in pickleball has made him well-known as a skilled player. Even with his fame from “Friends,” his pickleball achievements stand out. They show he’s quite versatile in sports.

Thinking about trying something new, like Perry did with pickleball? Grab a paddle and join the fun. You’ll find a large group of fans waiting to welcome you and share in the excitement of the sport.

Conclusion

Celebrities are making pickleball more famous, from top athletes to movie stars. They love the sport because it’s fun and keeps them fit. They play in special matches and tournaments just for celebrities.

They also use social media to share their pickleball stories. This has encouraged many people to give pickleball a try. Now, it’s not just a game. It’s a community where everyone, including famous people, comes together to have fun.

Trying out pickleball can be a great experience, whether you’re a fan or just curious. It brings people together, keeping you active and entertained. So, grab a paddle, hit the court, and see what all the fuss is about.

FAQ

Which celebrities are known for playing pickleball?

Selena Gomez, Ellen DeGeneres, Michael Phelps, and Matthew Perry love to play pickleball.

Why are celebrities attracted to pickleball?

Pickleball mixes fun with staying fit. It brings people together and is open to everyone.

How has Selena Gomez contributed to the growth of pickleball?

She’s been playing pickleball for years. Selena even started a pickleball business to help the sport grow.

How does Ellen DeGeneres showcase her love for pickleball?

Ellen shows off her pickleball love on social media. She plays with famous guests on her show too.

Why is Michael Phelps involved in pickleball?

Michael Phelps likes playing pickleball as a different sport. His interest shows how appealing pickleball is across sports.

How has Matthew Perry’s participation impacted pickleball?

Matthew Perry’s pickleball games show how the sport builds friendships. It showcases the joy of playing together.

How have celebrities contributed to the growing popularity of pickleball?

Celebrities boost pickleball’s popularity by joining matches and tournaments. They also help spread the word about the game.
